sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86500" key="proanagumna/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προανα-γυμνάζω</orth>, <sense id="n86500.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exercise before,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φωνήν, στόμα,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.105B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.105B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
